body.title: Fix scraps gate test — cmd_claim import after removal
body.result: removed stale cmd_claim import + TestCmdClaimRemoved class; 6 tests pass
body.intention: I intend that the scraps gate test file collects without error after cmd_claim was removed from cc_queue.py.
body.description:
test_cc_queue_scraps_gate.py imported cmd_claim which was deleted from cc_queue.py, causing collection failure. Remove import and TestCmdClaimRemoved class.

**Affected files:** tests/igor/test_cc_queue_scraps_gate.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Remove stale import + test class only.
**Completion criteria:** pytest tests/igor/test_cc_queue_scraps_gate.py passes 0 failures.
